changelog: New HUSHTV wordmark logo applied across the app — Android launcher icon at every density (mdpi 48 → xxxhdpi 192), legacy round mipmap variants, adaptive icon foreground (Android 8+), and Leanback TV banner all swapped to the new wordmark on a deep-navy tile. Side rail brand mark (both expanded and collapsed states) now uses the same wordmark drawable so the in-app logo and launcher icon match exactly. The wordmark itself is a clean vector reproduction (no AI artifacts, pin-sharp at every size) of the user's spec: 'HUSH' in white Inter Light + 'TV' in a purple-to-cyan gradient with 0.15 em letter-spacing.
